new_value: {"notes":"Commit: 5689fd88f. Validation for UDP length field added to from_bytes (reuses TooShort for cases where declared length is invalid relative to buffer)."}

Fixed: UdpHeader::from_bytes now validates the length field against buffer size using TooShort error for malformed packets claiming invalid lengths. Matches pattern from parse_packet and lichen-core UDP parser. Code updated and verified.
